title: Model Configuration
subtitle: Configure and manage AI model providers
confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this configuration?

cliAuth.sectionDescription: Import Codex CLI / Gemini CLI accounts already signed in on this machine and use them as models
cliAuth.empty: No signed-in Codex / Gemini CLI accounts detected. Sign in from the terminal first, then re-scan.
cliAuth.label: Authentication
cliAuth.notDetected: No signed-in {{kind}} account detected; sign in from the terminal first.

providerSelection.title: Select Model Provider
providerSelection.subtitle: Choose a preset provider for quick setup, or select custom for full manual configuration
providerSelection.customDescription: Manually configure all parameters, suitable for private deployments or other unlisted providers
providerSelection.fetchHint: Fetch the model list from the current provider; if it fails, fall back to common preset models
providerSelection.fetchFailedFallback: Failed to fetch model list, fell back to common preset models
providerSelection.fetchEmptyFallback: Provider returned no models, fell back to common preset models
providerSelection.fillApiKeyBeforeFetch: Enter the API key before fetching models
providerSelection.noPresetModels: No models available. Fetch the model list or enter a model name manually
providerSelection.multiSelectHint: Supports multi-select. After selection, configure context window, max output tokens, and reasoning per model.
providerSelection.modelAlreadyInList: This model is already in the list
providerSelection.urlHint: Official API URL pre-filled, modify if using proxy or private deployment
providerSelection.formatHint: Automatically selected based on provider, usually no need to change

categoryHints.general_chat: Text Generation: Generate text responses, code, etc. for most conversation scenarios
categoryHints.multimodal: Image Understanding: Understand image content and have mixed text-image conversations
categoryHints.image_generation: Image Generation: Generate images from text descriptions
categoryHints.speech_recognition: Speech Recognition: Convert speech to text (e.g., GLM-ASR)

form.modelNameHint: GLM-ASR uses glm-asr, other speech models use their corresponding model names
form.forceUrlHint: Append # to force use the exact URL you entered
form.contextWindowHint: Maximum context window size supported by the model (for calculating token usage percentage)
form.maxTokensHint: Maximum tokens for model output per request (affects response length)

thinking.enableHint: Requires model to support thinking mode

reasoningEffort.label: Reasoning Effort
reasoningEffort.hint: Controls provider-specific reasoning depth for DeepSeek, the Responses API, and supported Claude adaptive reasoning models

proxy.enableHint: When enabled, all AI requests will be sent through proxy (requires IDE restart)
proxy.saveSuccess: Proxy configuration saved, restart IDE to take effect

streamIdleTimeout.title: Streaming Timeout
streamIdleTimeout.label: Idle Timeout (seconds)
streamIdleTimeout.hint: Global idle timeout between streamed chunks after the stream starts. Leave empty to wait indefinitely.
streamIdleTimeout.invalid: Enter a positive integer in seconds, or leave this field empty.

streamTtftTimeout.title: First Token Timeout
streamTtftTimeout.label: TTFT Timeout (seconds)
streamTtftTimeout.hint: Maximum wait time after a request is sent for the first effective streamed output. Leave empty to wait indefinitely.
streamTtftTimeout.invalid: Enter a positive integer in seconds, or leave this field empty.

messages.duplicateModelNameUnderProvider: This provider already has a model with this name. Use a different name or edit the existing entry.
messages.invalidBaseUrlScheme: API URL must start with http:// or https://

connectionTestMessages.toolCallsNotDetected: This test did not detect any tool calls, so tool calling could not be verified this time.
connectionTestMessages.imageInputCheckFailed: The connection succeeded, but the image input check failed.
connectionTestMessages.tlsOrCertificateIssue: The connection failure may be related to SSL/TLS certificate verification. Check corporate proxies, self-signed certificates, system root certificates, or network interception. If you trust this network environment, you can enable "Skip SSL Certificate Verification" in this model's Advanced Settings, but it reduces HTTPS security.
connectionTestMessages.proxyIssue: The connection failure may be related to proxy or tunnel configuration. Check global proxy settings, proxy authentication, HTTPS CONNECT support, and whether the current network can reach this model API endpoint.
connectionTestMessages.networkIssue: The request failed while being sent, before any HTTP response was received. Check network connectivity, DNS, proxy, firewall, and certificate settings. In corporate proxy or self-signed certificate environments, you may also need to review "Skip SSL Certificate Verification" in Advanced Settings.

inlineThinkInText.label: Parse <think> Tags In Text
inlineThinkInText.hint: Split text streams containing <think>...</think> into live reasoning content.

skipSslVerify.label: Skip SSL Certificate Verification
skipSslVerify.warning: Skipping SSL verification is a security risk, use only in test or internal network environments!

customHeaders.label: Custom Headers
customHeaders.hint: Add or modify HTTP request headers
customHeaders.modeReplaceHint: Custom headers will completely replace default headers (you need to add Content-Type, Authorization, etc.)
customHeaders.modeMergeHint: Apply default headers first, then apply custom headers (can override existing values, add new values)

customRequestBody.label: Custom Request Body
customRequestBody.hint: Enter request body fields in JSON format to override default request parameters
customRequestBody.modeMergeHint: Merge custom fields into the default request body and allow overriding existing fields.
customRequestBody.trimHintOpenAI: Keep only model, messages, max_tokens, and runtime-critical stream / tool fields before applying the custom request body.
customRequestBody.trimHintResponses: Keep only model, input, instructions, max_output_tokens, and runtime-critical stream / tool fields before applying the custom request body.
customRequestBody.trimHintAnthropic: Keep only model, messages, system, max_tokens, and runtime-critical stream / tool fields before applying the custom request body.
customRequestBody.trimHintGemini: Keep only contents, systemInstruction, generationConfig.maxOutputTokens, and tools / toolConfig before applying the custom request body. Gemini model selection comes from the request URL.
customRequestBody.invalidJson: Invalid JSON format, please check syntax
customRequestBody.mergeHint: Custom fields will override corresponding fields in the default request body
